videoSnippet.title: The Perfect Attack || Topalov vs Naiditsch || Dortmund Sparkassen (2005)
videoSnippet.description:

Veselin Topalov vs Arkadij Naiditsch
Dortmund Sparkassen 2005 (2005), Dortmund GER, rd 2, Jul-09
Queen's Gambit Declined: Vienna Variation (D39) 

1. Nf3 Nf6 2. c4 e6 3. Nc3 d5 4. d4 dc4 5. e4 Bb4 6. Bg5 c5 7. e5 cd4 8. Nd4 Bc3 9. bc3 Qa5 10. ef6 Qg5 11. fg7 Qg7 12. Qd2 O-O 13. Bc4 a6 14. O-O Rd8 15. Qf4 b5 16. Qc7 Qf8 17. Bd3 Rd7 18. Qf4 Bb7 19. Rae1 Qg7 20. Be4 Kh8 21. Re3 Be4 22. Qe4 Rd5 23. Ne6 fe6 24. Qe6 Rd7 25. Rg3 Qf8 26. Re1 Raa7 27. Qf6

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:25 Game Starts!
03:50 CNG!
10:50 It WaS IN this Position!
12:05 FINAL STANDINGS
14:40 Legends of the Channel!
15:05 Lotus ENDGAMES are LIVE!!
